title: podman stats: fix race when ctr process exists
body:
stats read from the cgroup, and in order to know the cgroup we check the pid for the cgroup. However there is a window where the pid exited and podman did not yet updated its internal state. In this case the code returns ErrCtrStopped so we should ignore this error as well.

Fixes #23334

```release-note
Fixed a race in podman stats that could cause it to exit with a "container is stopped" error when showing all containers.
```
